purpose: DUA-safe aggregate threshold matrix for comparing selected ERA operating points.
public_policy: Aggregate metrics only. No row-level MIMIC data, no MIMIC IDs, and no exact patient-linked timestamps.

threshold_matrix.framing: Higher detection, more alerts; useful when higher sensitivity is preferred.
Most conservative; optimized for low false positives and alert-burden reduction.

recommended_story.t4: t=4.0 is the high-acuity / ICU operating point with higher detection and more alerts.
recommended_story.t5: t=5.0 is the balanced mixed-unit operating point.
recommended_story.t6: t=6.0 is the conservative telemetry / stepdown operating point optimized for low alert burden and low false positives.

pilot_safe_claim: Retrospective analysis on de-identified MIMIC data showed ERA can support configurable review-prioritization workflows with substantially reduced alert burden and retrospective lead-time context.
notice: Decision support only. Retrospective analysis only. Not intended to diagnose, direct treatment, replace clinician judgment, or independently trigger escalation.
